title: Ensure modern authentication for SharePoint applications is required
remediation:
In the Microsoft 365 Admin Center:
1. Go to SharePoint Admin Center.
2. Expand the Policies section then select Access control.
3. Select Apps that don't use modern authentication.
4. Select the radio button for Block access.
5. Click Save.
remediationImpact: Implementation of modern authentication for SharePoint will require users to authenticate to SharePoint using modern authentication. This may cause a minor impact to typical user behavior.
